evals.prompt: How do I create a type-safe @CurrentUser() decorator in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use createParamDecorator with ExecutionContext. Call ctx.switchToHttp().getRequest<RequestWithUser>(). Return typed user object. Avoid raw req.user access.

evals.prompt: How do I configure global validation in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Register ValidationPipe globally with whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true, transform: true. Use ParseIntPipe/ParseUUIDPipe on ID route params.

evals.prompt: How should I handle cleanup when a NestJS module is destroyed?
evals.expected_output: Implement OnApplicationShutdown interface and call app.enableShutdownHooks() in main.ts. Use OnModuleInit for connection setup.

should_not_trigger: How do I set up a NestJS module?
How do I implement caching in NestJS?
How do I write a Spring Boot controller?
